channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Michigan Democrats move to protect reproductive health data before GOP takes control of House
item.description: Democrats in Michigan are pressing to pass reproductive health care legislation before the party loses its majority with the new legislative session next year.
item.dc:creator: Isabella Volmert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Why the ‘one AI model to rule them all’ myth needs to die
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: These satellites are on a mission to create the first fake solar eclipses. Here’s how
item.description: A pair of European satellites rocketed into orbit Thursday on the first mission to create artificial solar eclipses through fancy formation flying in space. Each fake eclipse should last six hours once operations begin next year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Meta’s massive $10 billion AI data center is coming to this state
item.description: The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI unveils API for tracking OpenAI API usage, costs
item.description: OpenAI has introduced the Usage API, an API that allows enterprises to track their activity across the OpenAI API. With the Usage API, OpenAI API usage and costs can be assessed programmatically, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Quake prompts brief tsunami warning on the West Coast. Here's what to know about tsunamis
item.description: The powerful earthquake that struck in Northern California on Thursday prompted a brief tsunami warning affecting about 5 million people along a stretch of the West Coast — from Northern California to Oregon — before being canceled.
item.dc:creator: Mark Thiessen, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Meta: AI created less than 1% of the disinformation around 2024 elections
item.description: AI-generated content accounted for less than 1% of the disinformation fact-checkers linked to political elections that took place worldwide in 2024, according to social media giant Meta.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI glasses to help dementia patients aims to launch next year
item.description: “It’s continuously watching your visual environment and giving you assistance,” CareYaya CEO Neal Shah said.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Prann, NewsNation

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 8 phishing email scams to watch out for this holiday season
item.description: Be on alert this holiday season for phishing emails. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson shares several examples of fake phishing emails he's received in his inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft: TPM 2.0 is a ‘non-negotiable’ requirement for Windows 11
item.description: With Windows 10 end of support on the horizon, Microsoft said its Trusted Platform Module (TPM) 2.0 requirement for PCs is a “non-negotiable standard” for upgrading to Windows 11.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Concerns mount over Musk’s taste for revenge
item.description: Elon Musk’s growing criticism of President-elect Trump’s opponents and industry competitors is raising concerns he may use his increasing influence to intimidate adversaries.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Location sharing is the latest way to hard launch a relationship
item.description: Are you location sharing official? Whether it’s for practical reasons, like checking if your partner can swing past your favorite takeaway on the way home, or seeing if they have got home safely from a night out, location sharing is quickly becoming the digital equivalent of leaving a toothbrush at
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: AWS upgrades its 10p10u network to handle massive AI clusters
item.description: While virtualized compute is the foundation of cloud computing, enabling all that compute to transmit data is the job of the network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Max to begin cracking down on password sharing next week
item.description: Max will begin its password-sharing crackdown next week, beginning with "very early, gentle messaging" directed at high-usage users.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, NewsNation

item.title: Kotlin previews guard conditions in when expressions
item.description: JetBrains has released Kotlin 2.1.0, an update to the Kotlin programming language that previews guard conditions and has compiler updates offering flexibility around checks. Released November 27, Kotlin 2.1.0 can be installed as an update by following the instructions at kotlinlang.org. Kotlin 2.1.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China bans exports to US of gallium, germanium, antimony in response to chip sanctions
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China announced Tuesday it is banning exports to the United States of gallium, germanium, antimony and other key high-tech materials with potential military applications, as a general principle, lashing back at U.S. limits on semiconductor-related exports.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Understanding unstructured data in the context of AI
item.description: The volume of data being created today is truly staggering. IDC projects that global data will reach 400 zettabytes (400 billion terabytes) by 2028, with 90% of that data classified as unstructured data.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cyber Monday shoppers expected to set a record on the year's biggest day for online shopping
item.description: Consumers in the United States are scouring the internet for online deals as they look to take advantage of the post-Thanksgiving shopping marathon with Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AWS PartyRock updated with free daily usage for developers
item.description: Amazon Web Services has updated AWS PartyRock, its mostly free low code tool for building generative AI applications with a new app search function and the ability to build document processing into applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World
